## Pre-PR Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes with no failures
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] No plaintext secrets are written to disk — all encryption/decryption uses SOPS subprocess piping
- [ ] New CLI commands include unit tests with mocked SubprocessRunner
- [ ] New UI components include React Testing Library tests
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
